summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a rare mid‑April Irvine show with stellar Jerry vocals.
review: The Charlie Miller bootleg is praised as a brilliant production, delivering crystal‑clear soundboard quality that lets the band’s energy shine through. Reviewers highlight the rare California sprint tour vibe and note Jerry Garcia’s vocal performance as a major rebound.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one highly positive review; it praises both the recording (brilliant bootleg, clear mix) and the show (strong vocals), warranting a near‑top rating but limited data lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Brilliant bootleg production by Charlie Miller; mix described as clear and high‑quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Rare mid‑April California sprint tour show noted for energetic performance and especially strong Jerry vocals.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Vocals described as a big‑time rebound, very strong.
